translation: Merry? Shall we have a play extempore?

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
translation: %1$s own soft head has met a falling anvil

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
translation: Art thou certain thou wishest to depart?

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: 'Twill be five days ere this trial theatre doth drawe closed its curtaines. Play well!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Thee hath passed thy fifth and final day, press %s to inscribe a picture of thy creation.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: This demo shall last 4 moons and 5 suns (tis about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the advancements for hints! Have great fun!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: The curtaines of thy trial theatre are now been drawne to a close; purchase the game to againe open them or start anewe!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Art thou certain of thy wish to bind the difficulty of thy world? 'Twill forever establish thy difficulty to be %1$s, and henceforth thou wilt never beest able to alter 't.
